name: Ezerath's Last Hope
short_description: An action packed, beat em' up RPG with an open world for you to explore with over 40 areas, 9 different dungeons, 14 side quests, over 150 items to collect, multiple classes of combat, and various different mechanics to get stronger. You can play Ezerath's Last Hope with up to 8 friends!
detailed_description:
In a world doomed to the tyrant of the great evil Dark Lord, the guild of Ezerath recruits you to eliminate the Dark Lord. To get to the Dark Lord you must first clear each of his 8 Grand Generals dungeons, obtaining loot and experience along the way. During your grind you can also stop to help the NPC's of Ezerath by completing unique side quests for other fun rewards. The open world also has secrets, extra mini-bosses, events, and enemy loot drops for you to discover. Do you have what it takes to explore and save the land of Ezerath?

Open World
There are over 40 different areas to explore, in order to progress through the game you must explore new areas. The open world also has multiple different secrets with different unique rewards

Side Quests
Side Quests can either be started by talking to NPC's, or as world events triggered by progressing through the main quest line. Each quest is different from the last and provides a reward to help you level up!

Dungeons
Discover and conquer 9 different dungeons to obtain newer and stronger items!

Multiplayer
Play with up to 8 players co-op!

*languages with full audio support
